failure_modes.text: Treating a lollapalooza outcome as if it had one cause hides the interacting forces that actually made it possible.
failure_modes.source_quote: combinatorial effects that create lollapalooza consequences
failure_modes.mitigation: Map the interacting forces explicitly: if the outcome required more than one factor, label each and trace how they combined rather than crediting a single cause.

failure_modes.text: False pattern recognition makes a novel interacting system look like a familiar one-cause problem.
failure_modes.source_quote: I have seen this one before, it is an X problem
failure_modes.mitigation: Challenge any one-cause explanation of a surprising outcome by asking which additional conditions were necessary for it to happen.

failure_modes.text: Motivated reasoning can force the team to explain away interactions that threaten a preferred story.
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate the evidence for each interacting force before allowing a narrative synthesis; motivated reasoning hides behind the combined story.

premortem_questions.text: Which forces are aligned here, and what happens if one of the supposedly minor drivers is removed from the combination?
premortem_questions.source_quote: multiple factors or forces, when aligned and interacting

premortem_questions.text: Are we seeing the whole interacting system, or only the most vivid contributor?
premortem_questions.source_quote: multiple factors shape almost every system

premortem_questions.text: What assumptions are we making when we claim these drivers will compound rather than cancel each other out?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would you have to believe?

heuristics.text: Map interacting pressures across disciplines before naming the dominant mechanism.
heuristics.source_quote: ignore jurisdictional boundaries and synthesize the best ideas

heuristics.text: Use symphony-style synthesis to see how multiple elements produce an outsized whole.
Prefer cross-checking compound drivers with feedback and second-order consequence analysis before acting.

curation_notes.summary: Chunk set stays close to the source's strongest failure modes, premortem questions, and repeatable heuristics.
donor_drops: Did not widen the chunk surface beyond clearly source-backed failure, premortem, and heuristic material.
open_questions: Some chunk text is compressed for operational reuse, but each item stays traceable to explicit source language.

allies: Relation-rich ally material was left for Wave 3 instead of being smuggled into chunk text.
antagonists: Bias and conflict material stronger as first-order relations was deferred to Wave 3.
structured_tensions: Any higher-order candidacy remains observational only in batch artifacts.
